Web search results for query: "CSS masonry specification "grid integrated" "grid independent" 2024 2025 status update"

Links: [{"title":"CSS Masonry & CSS Grid | CSS-Tricks","url":"https://css-tricks.com/css-masonry-css-grid/"},{"title":"Help us choose the final syntax for Masonry in CSS | WebKit","url":"https://webkit.org/blog/16026/css-masonry-syntax/"},{"title":"Masonry In CSS: Should Grid Evolve Or Stand Aside For A New Module? — Smashing Magazine","url":"https://www.smashingmagazine.com/2025/05/masonry-css-should-grid-evolve-stand-aside-new-module/"},{"title":"CSS WG Blog – First Public Working Draft of CSS Grid Level 3 / Masonry Layout","url":"https://www.w3.org/blog/CSS/2024/09/24/css-grid-3-fpwd/"},{"title":"Brick by brick: Help us build CSS Masonry | Blog | Chrome for Developers","url":"https://developer.chrome.com/blog/masonry-update"},{"title":"Should masonry be part of CSS grid?","url":"https://ishadeed.com/article/css-grid-masonry/"},{"title":"Choosing a Masonry Syntax in CSS | OddBird","url":"https://www.oddbird.net/2024/10/01/grid-masonry-nuance/"},{"title":"Masonry layout - CSS - MDN Web Docs","url":"https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/Guides/Grid_layout/Masonry_layout"},{"title":"Masonry layout - CSS | MDN","url":"https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/CSS_grid_layout/Masonry_layout"},{"title":"CSS WG Blog – Masonry Spec Update and Open Issues","url":"https://www.w3.org/blog/CSS/2025/09/18/masonry-update-issues/"}]

Based on the search results, here's a comprehensive status update on the CSS masonry specification:

## Current Status Update (2024-2025)

### Specification Development

The CSS Working Group published a First Public Working Draft of CSS Grid Layout Module Level 3 aka CSS Masonry Layout in September 2024. This draft represents masonry layout as a built-in capability of CSS in two possible syntactic forms: a grid-integrated syntax, and a grid-independent syntax, both of which are outlined as alternatives.

### Key Resolution

After proving it is possible, the CSSWG resolved to adopt mixed track-sizing for masonry-style layouts in September 2024. The CSSWG has resolved to adopt fully mixed track sizing for this layout model, allowing all the possible track listings expressible in CSS Grid Layout for masonry layout as well, which unifies the two incoming proposals' underlying layout models.

### Recent Evolution (2025)

As of December 2025, the debates about the grid-integrated versus grid-independent syntax have been settled, with the feature now known as CSS Grid Lanes. Level 3 of the CSS grid layout specification defines masonry layout (also known as grid-lanes layout), which is accessed via the display values grid-lanes and inline-grid-lanes.

### Browser Implementation

The Microsoft Edge and Google Chrome teams announced that CSS masonry is ready for early developer testing from Chrome and Edge 140.

### Outstanding Issues

There remain some major syntax questions open, including what display name to use for enabling masonry layout, and interpreting row vs column in masonry layouts.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.
